meta.title: Free vs Paid: Which BetsPlug Plan? | BetsPlug
meta.description: Compare free and paid BetsPlug tiers. Same AI engine, different volume and depth. 5 daily predictions free, unlimited paid.

hero.h1: Free or Paid: Which BetsPlug is Right for You?
hero.subheadline: Both tiers use the same AI engine and methodology. The difference is volume, depth, and timing. Find your match below.

visual.h2: What You See on Each Tier

limitations: Basic info only (no xG, H2H, lineups)

useCases: Full match analysis (xG, H2H, lineups, reasoning)

profiles.title: Casual Tester
profiles.description: Curious about AI predictions, want to try before committing. Only follow 1-2 top leagues.

profiles.title: Regular Bettor
profiles.description: Bet 2-3 times per week across multiple leagues. Want consistent prediction quality, not last-minute picks.

profiles.title: Serious Analyst
profiles.description: Daily prediction following, multiple bet markets, need data depth. Want early access and notifications.

questions.q: Are free predictions less accurate than paid?
questions.a: No. Free predictions use the same AI engine and methodology as paid. The difference is volume, depth, timing, and league coverage — not accuracy.

questions.q: Why do I need a credit card for the trial?
questions.a: Standard SaaS billing setup. You're not charged for the first 7 days. Cancel before day 7 and no charge occurs. We require payment method to prevent trial abuse.

questions.q: Can I downgrade from paid to free?
questions.a: Yes, anytime. Cancel your paid plan from the account dashboard. Your access continues until the end of the billing period, then auto-converts to free tier.

questions.q: What if I only want 1-2 specific bet types?
questions.a: Free tier shows our highest-confidence pick per match (varies by match). Paid plans show all markets per match. If you focus on 1-2 specific markets, paid still helps because you can compare across more matches.

questions.q: Is the 7-day free trial really risk-free?
questions.a: Yes. No charge during 7 days. Plus, if you do get charged after 7 days and aren't satisfied, our money-back guarantee covers the first paid month.

finalCta.body: 5 free predictions per day. No credit card required for free.
